title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 8: The Way to the Supreme
description: Chapter 8 of the Bhagavad Gita: At the moment of death, whoever thinks of me alone attains my nature.
introduction: Chapter 8 of the Bhagavad Gita: At the moment of death, whoever thinks of me alone attains my nature.

translation.text: Whoever, at the time of death, quits the body remembering me alone, attains my nature. Of this there is no doubt.
